testsuite.name: execute_products.CreateMultipleProductsTest
testsuite.system-out: Navigated to 'Create Organization' layout Entered Organization Name with random suffix: awshubh_903 Clicked on Save button Navigated to the 'Create Lead' page Entered Lead First Name: shubham_ Entered Lead Last Name: jaiswal Entered Company Name: ty_ Navigated to 'Create Product' page Layout Entered Product Name: parle_ Validating actual Organization Name [awshubh_903] against expected [awshubh_903] Clicked on Save button Validating saved Last Name [jaiswal] against expected [jaiswal] Validating saved Company Name [ty_] against expected [ty_] Clicked on Save button Validating actual Product Name [parle_] against expected [parle_] Data-Driven Input - Creating Product: Enterprise_CRM_Cloud_203 Data-Driven Input - Creating Product: AI_Analytics_Module_300 Data-Driven Input - Creating Product: Fintech_Payment_Gateway_526
